channel.title: SHOP — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on SHOP (Shopify) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Tom Slater: ADDED SHOP (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) added SHOP in Q4 2025 · 4.7% of portfolio. Adding Shopify.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: EXITED SHOP (-100%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) exited SHOP in Q3 2024 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Warren Buffett: EXITED SHOP (-100%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) exited SHOP in Q3 2024 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED SHOP (+262%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added SHOP in Q2 2024 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED SHOP (+15%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added SHOP in Q2 2024 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)
